sentence_reviews.text: Random sampling is reformulated so gradients can pass through stochastic latent variables.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML support latent-variable models, variational inference, and reparameterization-style gradient estimators.
sentence_reviews.notes: The claim is standard for reparameterization, but direct verification would require a VAE/reparameterization source.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Reparameterization & differentiable sampling is to connect Probability theory, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields, Variational autoencoders, Diffusion & score-based models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support probability, latent variables, and variational models, but not the full downstream list.
sentence_reviews.notes: VAE support is strong; flows and diffusion/score-based models need more specific sources.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support variational autoencoders and reparameterization background.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources provide probabilistic/generative background, not direct diffusion or score-based model evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Latent variables & hidden state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support probability and latent-variable dependencies but not the generic limitation statement.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are plausible; the limitation wording is not directly sourced.

sentence_reviews.text: Reparameterization & differentiable sampling uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML supports probability and stochastic latent-variable modeling.
sentence_reviews.notes: Sampling and stochastic latent variables directly rely on probability.

sentence_reviews.text: Reparameterization & differentiable sampling uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.text: Reparameterization & differentiable sampling uses Calculus & automatic differentiation theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.notes: Differentiating through reparameterized samples relies on calculus/autodiff.

edge_reviews.notes: Probability theory is core to stochastic sampling.
Latent variables are central to the node definition; core strength is defensible.
Autodiff/calculus supports gradient flow through reparameterized samples; common strength is defensible.
